DXC · SCCL SOC · 4-4-4-4 rotation + PPLUL

Shifts & training
Jul 2026 – Sep 2027

Lifting on every shift day plus two sessions per off-block. Cardio (tower stepper on shift, Stairmaster otherwise) rides on every upper-body day — never on Legs or Lower. PPLUL rolls continuously, so all five sessions get equal frequency.

The cycle · shift + lift + cardio
4 nights4 off4 days4 off
Green segments = cardio day (upper-body sessions). Sessions shown for cycle 1 — the sequence carries over between cycles, so later cycles start on whichever session is next.

Macro targets · lean athletic build

Current: 72 kg @ 5'9" · goal: Spider-Man / Invincible-style physique — broad shoulders, visible abs, no bulk-phase softness. Lean gain at ~0.25 kg/month.
Training + cardio days
Calories2,550 kcal
Protein180 g
Carbs290 g
Fat75 g
Lift-only / rest days
Calories2,350 kcal
Protein180 g
Carbs250 g
Fat70 g
Protein stays fixed at 2.5 g/kg regardless of day type. On nights, spread it across your actual waking hours — clock-time meals don't matter, totals do. The lean-athletic look is driven by staying in a small surplus and letting shoulders/back volume do the shaping, not by chasing bigger calorie numbers.
Night shift
Day shift
Off
Bank holiday
Cardio day (green underline)
12 sessions per 16-day cycle ≈ 5.3×/week · rest on the first & last day of each off-block · cardio ~7×/cycle on upper days

Bank holidays & notable dates you're rostered on

Scotland public holidays landing on a working shift — the pay-premium question for Joe. Training shown too so you can plan around them.
